summary: File upload preview testing complete. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). All features verified: HEIC/HEIF extensions allowed, content_type stored in file info, correct Content-Type headers returned for JPEG (image/jpeg) and PDF (application/pdf). Frontend: Image preview modal (data-testid=image-preview-overlay) works correctly for images, PDFs open in new tab, close button and background click both close modal. Deposit policy notice and checkbox work correctly in booking form.
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings with JPEG and PDF uploads: TEST_ImageUpload User (JPEG payment proof, PDF vaccination cert), TEST_PDFUpload User (PDF payment proof, JPEG vaccination cert)
context_for_next_testing_agent: File upload and preview features fully verified. Key findings: 1) HEIC/HEIF extensions are in ALLOWED_UPLOAD_EXTENSIONS and auto-converted to JPEG via pillow-heif 2) save_upload stores content_type in file info dict 3) GET /api/admin/documents/{id}/{type} returns FileResponse with explicit media_type from stored content_type or file extension fallback 4) Frontend openProtectedDocument returns {type: 'image', url} for images which triggers previewImage state in BookingDetailDialog 5) Image preview modal (data-testid=image-preview-overlay) appears with img tag, close button (data-testid=close-preview-button), clicking background also closes 6) PDFs open in new tab via window.open 7) Booking form has deposit policy notice (data-testid=deposit-policy-notice) and checkbox (data-testid=deposit-policy-checkbox) that must be checked to enable submit button.

backend_upload.heic_conversion: pillow-heif converts HEIC/HEIF to JPEG with content_type=image/jpeg
backend_upload.content_type_storage: save_upload stores content_type in returned file info dict
backend_upload.document_preview_api: GET /api/admin/documents/{id}/{type} returns FileResponse with media_type from stored content_type

image_preview_modal.background_close: Clicking overlay background also closes modal

frontend_preview.pdf_behavior: PDFs open in new tab via window.open, no modal

booking_form.deposit_policy_checkbox: data-testid=deposit-policy-checkbox, must be checked to submit
